name: Volume 1 - Personal Loan Template
content:
Volume 1 — Personal Loan
Target Audience
Salaried Professionals
Working Professionals
Self-Employed Individuals
Overview
This starter document contains the structure for a Meta-compliant 30-Day Personal Loan WhatsApp Lead Nurturing Journey.
Day 0
Template:Welcome! Thank you for contacting {{Business Name}}. Reply with your loan requirement and preferred callback time.

Template:Follow-up message for Day 1: Provide helpful information, answer common questions, request only necessary details, and invite the customer to continue the conversation.

name: Volume 10 - CIBIL Consultation Template
content:
Volume 10 – CIBIL Consultation
Target Audience
Individuals with Low Credit Scores
Loan Applicants
Salaried Professionals
Self-Employed Individuals
Business Owners
30-Day Meta-Approved CIBIL Consultation Journey
Day 0
Template:Welcome! Thank you for your interest in CIBIL Consultation services. Please share your requirement and preferred callback time for a consultation.
Suggested CTA: Get Details
Day 1
Template:Day 1: Share educational information about credit reports, responsible credit management, common factors affecting credit scores, documentation, and consultation services. Avoid promising score improvements or guaranteed loan approvals.
Suggested CTA: Learn More

name: Volume 11 - Universal CRM Templates.docx Template
content:
Volume 11 – Universal CRM Templates
Universal CRM Template Categories
Welcome
Qualification
Reminder
Document Collection
Application Update
Approval Notification
Rejection / Next Steps
Disbursement
Referral
Review Request
Cross-Sell
Reactivation
Birthday Greetings
Festival Greetings
Renewal Reminder
Template Library
Welcome
Purpose: Welcome communication.Sample Template:Hello {1}, thank you for connecting with {Business Name}. This message is intended for welcome purposes. Our advisor will assist you with the next appropriate step.
Suggested CTA: Learn More / Schedule Call / Contact Advisor
Qualification
Purpose: Qualification communication.Sample Template:Hello {1}, thank you for connecting with {Business Name}. This message is intended for qualification purposes. Our advisor will assist you with the next appropriate step.
Suggested CTA: Learn More / Schedule Call / Contact Advisor
Reminder
Purpose: Reminder communication.Sample Template:Hello {1}, thank you for connecting with {Business Name}. This message is intended for reminder purposes. Our advisor will assist you with the next appropriate step.
Suggested CTA: Learn More / Schedule Call / Contact Advisor
Document Collection
Purpose: Document Collection communication.Sample Template:Hello {1}, thank you for connecting with {Business Name}. This message is intended for document collection purposes. Our advisor will assist you with the next appropriate step.
Suggested CTA: Learn More / Schedule Call / Contact Advisor
Application Update
Purpose: Application Update communication.Sample Template:Hello {1}, thank you for connecting with {Business Name}. This message is intended for application update purposes. Our advisor will assist you with the next appropriate step.
Suggested CTA: Learn More / Schedule Call / Contact Advisor
Approval Notification
Purpose: Approval Notification communication.Sample Template:Hello {1}, thank you for connecting with {Business Name}. This message is intended for approval notification purposes. Our advisor will assist you with the next appropriate step.
Suggested CTA: Learn More / Schedule Call / Contact Advisor
Rejection / Next Steps
Purpose: Rejection / Next Steps communication.Sample Template:Hello {1}, thank you for connecting with {Business Name}. This message is intended for rejection / next steps purposes. Our advisor will assist you with the next appropriate step.
Suggested CTA: Learn More / Schedule Call / Contact Advisor
Disbursement
Purpose: Disbursement communication.Sample Template:Hello {1}, thank you for connecting with {Business Name}. This message is intended for disbursement purposes. Our advisor will assist you with the next appropriate step.
Suggested CTA: Learn More / Schedule Call / Contact Advisor
Referral
Purpose: Referral communication.Sample Template:Hello {1}, thank you for connecting with {Business Name}. This message is intended for referral purposes. Our advisor will assist you with the next appropriate step.
Suggested CTA: Learn More / Schedule Call / Contact Advisor
Review Request
Purpose: Review Request communication.Sample Template:Hello {1}, thank you for connecting with {Business Name}. This message is intended for review request purposes. Our advisor will assist you with the next appropriate step.
Suggested CTA: Learn More / Schedule Call / Contact Advisor
Cross-Sell
Purpose: Cross-Sell communication.Sample Template:Hello {1}, thank you for connecting with {Business Name}. This message is intended for cross-sell purposes. Our advisor will assist you with the next appropriate step.
Suggested CTA: Learn More / Schedule Call / Contact Advisor
Reactivation
Purpose: Reactivation communication.Sample Template:Hello {1}, thank you for connecting with {Business Name}. This message is intended for reactivation purposes. Our advisor will assist you with the next appropriate step.
Suggested CTA: Learn More / Schedule Call / Contact Advisor
Birthday Greetings
Purpose: Birthday Greetings communication.Sample Template:Hello {1}, thank you for connecting with {Business Name}. This message is intended for birthday greetings purposes. Our advisor will assist you with the next appropriate step.
Suggested CTA: Learn More / Schedule Call / Contact Advisor
Festival Greetings
Purpose: Festival Greetings communication.Sample Template:Hello {1}, thank you for connecting with {Business Name}. This message is intended for festival greetings purposes. Our advisor will assist you with the next appropriate step.
Suggested CTA: Learn More / Schedule Call / Contact Advisor
Renewal Reminder
Purpose: Renewal Reminder communication.Sample Template:Hello {1}, thank you for connecting with {Business Name}. This message is intended for renewal reminder purposes. Our advisor will assist you with the next appropriate step.
Suggested CTA: Learn More / Schedule Call / Contact Advisor
Universal CRM Workflow
Lead Captured → Welcome → Qualification → Follow-up → Documents → Advisor Assigned → Application Processing → Status Updates → Disbursement → Referral → Cross-Sell → Reactivation
Common Variables
{{1}} Customer Name
{{Business Name}}
{{Advisor Name}}
{{Product Name}}
{{Application Number}}
{{City}}
{{Appointment Date}}
Automation Triggers
New Lead
No Response
Documents Pending
Appointment Scheduled
Application Submitted
Status Updated
Disbursement Completed
Birthday
Festival
Renewal Due
